mapper.select: SELECT team_id,team_name,t.stadium_id,emblem,s.name,s.address,s.capacity,s.latitude,s.longitude,s.image,s.near_station_name,s.near_station_lat,s.near_station_lng FROM KLeague_Team t JOIN KLeague_Stadium s ON t.stadium_id=s.stadium_id WHERE team_id=#{team_id}
SELECT team_id,team_name,emblem,s.name FROM KLeague_team t JOIN KLeague_Stadium s ON t.stadium_id=s.stadium_id ORDER BY team_id ASC

SELECT RANK() OVER( ORDER BY SUM(u.points) DESC, SUM(u.goals) DESC, SUM(u.goal_diff) DESC ) AS rank, t.team_id, t.team_name, t.emblem, SUM(u.wins) AS wins, SUM(u.points) AS points, SUM(u.goals) AS goals, SUM(u.goal_diff) AS goal_diff FROM ( SELECT home_team_id AS team_id, CASE WHEN home_goal > away_goal THEN 3 WHEN home_goal = away_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS points, home_goal AS goals, (home_goal-away_goal) AS goal_diff, home_win AS wins FROM kleague_schedule WHERE game_date>=TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND game_status='A'
UNION ALL
SELECT away_team_id AS team_id, CASE WHEN away_goal>home_goal THEN 3 WHEN away_goal=home_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS points, away_goal AS goals, (away_goal-home_goal) AS goal_diff, away_win AS wins FROM kleague_schedule WHERE game_date>=TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND game_status='A' ) u JOIN kleague_team t ON u.team_id = t.team_id GROUP BY t.team_name, t.team_id, t.emblem ORDER BY rank ASC
